name: claude-harness-forge
description: GAN-inspired autonomous SDLC scaffold (BRD v3.0). Loaded as a Claude Code plugin via --plugin-dir.

scripts.verify:hooks: for f in hooks/*.js; do node -c "$f" || exit 1; done && echo OK
scripts.verify:scripts: for f in scripts/*.js; do node -c "$f" || exit 1; done && echo OK
scripts.verify:json: for f in feature_list.json settings.json .claude-plugin/plugin.json state/eval-scores.json state/monotonic-policy.json templates/features-template.json; do jq -e . $f >/dev/null || exit 1; done && echo OK
scripts.test: npm run verify:json && npm run verify:hooks && npm run verify:scripts && npm run test:hooks

dependencies._comment: Deps declared but install is deferred per BRD §10 vendor-first mandate. The harness ships these declarations so a scaffolded target project picks them up; the forge repo itself does not require an npm install for hooks/scripts (they're stdlib-only).

optionalDependencies._comment: Browser-MCP servers declared per BRD §3.8; runtime picks one based on project stack.
